text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 CNN: The USS Gerald R. Ford aircraft carrier has entered the Red Sea alongside the guided-missile destroyers USS Mahan and USS Winston S. Churchill after transiting the Suez Canal from the Eastern Mediterranean. Additional U.S. naval assets are also moving into the region, including the USS George H. W. Bush, which is en route and could reinforce or replace the Ford, while the USS Abraham Lincoln is already operating in the Middle East. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 CNN：杰拉尔德·R·福特号航空母舰在穿过苏伊士运河从东地中海进入红海后，已与马汉号和温斯顿·S·丘吉尔号导弹驱逐舰会合。其他美国海军资产也正在向该地区移动，包括正在途中可能增援或替换福特号的乔治·H·W·布什号，而亚伯拉罕·林肯号已在中东地区执行任务。 @wfwitness

text: 🇺🇦 Ukraine’s military ombudsman admits a widespread issue: drug-dependent individuals are serving in the armed forces. What was first discovered in one unit turned out to be a broader pattern across the military. Many had previously been on substitution therapy — which cannot be continued in service. 🐻 Just like their president... 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇦 乌克兰军事监察员承认了一个普遍存在的问题：有毒瘾的人员正在武装部队中服役。最初在一个部队中发现的问题，结果证明是整个军队中更广泛的模式。许多人此前曾接受替代疗法——但在服役期间无法继续进行。 🐻 就像他们的总统一样…… 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Visioner ‼️ ‼️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 BREAKING | The U.S. Navy’s largest aircraft carrier, the USS Gerald R. Ford, has returned to the Middle East. ➡️ The carrier, which had recently been operating in the Eastern Mediterranean, transited the Suez Canal alongside two destroyers — USS Mahan and USS Winston S. Churchill — and is now in the Red Sea, where it may take part in military operations against Iran if necessary. See the latest updates with us: @visionergeo tweet
text_zh: Visioner ‼️ ‼️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 突发 | 美国海军最大的航空母舰“杰拉尔德·R·福特”号（USS Gerald R. Ford）已返回中东。➡️ 该航母此前一直在东地中海执行任务，现已与两艘驱逐舰——“马汉”号（USS Mahan）和“温斯顿·S·丘吉尔”号（USS Winston S. Churchill）一起通过苏伊士运河，目前位于红海。如有必要，它可能会参与针对伊朗的军事行动。与我们一起查看最新动态：@visionergeo 推文

text: The Spectator Index Trump tells ABC News he will 'prohibit' Netanyahu from bombing Lebanon and will tell Netanyahu 'he cannot do it'. tweet
text_zh: The Spectator Index 特朗普告诉美国广播公司新闻（ABC News），他将“禁止”内塔尼亚胡轰炸黎巴嫩，并会告诉内塔尼亚胡“他不能这样做”。推文

text: Visioner 🇮🇷 🇺🇲 In the best case, Trump is still bluffing and with these lies is creating a kind of psycho-informational bubble to disguise reality, plus manipulating oil prices and giving ground forces time to prepare. Otherwise, it is simply inexplicable what logic Trump’s actions and statements serve. tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇮🇷 🇺🇲 最好的情况是，特朗普仍在虚张声势，用这些谎言制造一种心理信息泡沫来掩盖现实，同时操纵油价并为地面部队争取准备时间。否则，特朗普的行为和言论所遵循的逻辑简直令人费解。推文

text: Visioner 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Reporter: Iran says there are significant differences. Trump: There could be. If there are, we will have to straighten it out, but I don’t think there are too many significant differences. https://twitter.com/visionergeo/status/2045250088860090553/video/1 tweet

If…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 U.S. President Trump says that as soon as a deal is signed the blockade of the Strait of Hormuz will end. Reporter: "Okay, mister president. What will it take to end the blockade?" Trump: "When the agreement is signed, the blockade ends." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷美国总统特朗普认为在与伊朗的谈判中不存在重大分歧。记者：“今天有报道称，伊朗仍表示存在重大分歧。”特朗普：“嗯，可能有。让我们看看会发生什么。如果……” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国总统特朗普表示，一旦协议签署，霍尔木兹海峡的封锁就会结束。记者：“好的，总统先生。需要什么条件才能结束封锁？”特朗普：“协议签署时，封锁就会结束。” @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷🇱🇧🇮🇱U.S. President Trump reports that talks with Iran and about the ceasefire between Israel and Lebanon will likely continue over the weekend. "Talks are going on. It'll go on over the weekend, and a lot of good things are happening. And that includes…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 U.S. President Trump doesn't believe there are significant differences with Iran in negotiations. Reporter: "There's a reporting today that there's still Iran says there's significant differences." Trump: "Well, could be. Let's see what happens. If there are, we'll have to straighten it out, but I don't think there's too many significant differences." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷🇱🇧🇮🇱美国总统特朗普报告称，与伊朗的谈判以及关于以色列和黎巴嫩之间的停火谈判可能会持续到周末。“谈判正在进行中。它将持续到周末，很多好事正在发生。这包括……” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国总统特朗普认为在与伊朗的谈判中不存在重大分歧。记者：“今天有报道称，伊朗仍表示存在重大分歧。”特朗普：“嗯，可能有。让我们看看会发生什么。如果有的话，我们将不得不解决它，但我认为没有太多重大分歧。” @wfwitness

text: 🇺🇸 Trump seems to have calmed down a little after manipulating the oil market with back-to-back posts on a social media platform that hardly anyone uses. Welcome to 2026. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 U.S. President Trump reports that talks with Iran and about the ceasefire between Israel and Lebanon will likely continue over the weekend. "Talks are going on. It'll go on over the weekend, and a lot of good things are happening. And that includes Lebanon too. Lebanon too." @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 美国总统特朗普报告称，与伊朗的谈判以及关于以色列和黎巴嫩之间的停火谈判可能会持续到周末。“谈判正在进行中。它将持续到周末，很多好事正在发生。这也包括黎巴嫩。黎巴嫩也是。” @wfwitness

text: This is a ceasefire that the IDF wants to have the Lebanese state and army fight on its behalf to disarm Hezbullah after the IDF acknowledged clearly that the IDF reserves are exhausted and the IDF is incapable of invading all of Lebanon to disarm every town and village The current lines of occupation are similar to the 1980's excluding some important area they didn't enter. The IDF ground invasion is pathetic, a few km into Lebanon against towns they invaded and attacked and levelled in the 2024 and softened in the support front that sit under high ridges the IDF sits in (in Israel) after proactive attacks and depopulation for 15 months. Hezbullah didn't do as good as you would want to see Israel defeated as. But they did all what is humanly possible and excelled under whatever harsh condition there was and still is The IDF says the ceasefire will allow it to fortify the occupation in the current area to protect Israel from ATGMs attacks (this is why we need dozens of FPVs) The IDF will demolish towns and build basis inside Lebanon as a precaution that the Lebanese state will not be able to disarm Hezbullah If the Lebanese state fails and occupation stays, resistance acts and war happens again Do you guys understand the circle of events here?
text_zh: 这是一份停火协议，以色列国防军希望黎巴嫩国家和军队能代其行事，解除真主党的武装，因为以色列国防军已明确承认其预备役力量耗尽，且无力入侵整个黎巴嫩以解除每个城镇和村庄的武装。目前的占领线与20世纪80年代相似，但排除了一些他们未进入的重要区域。以色列国防军的地面入侵表现糟糕，仅深入黎巴嫩几公里，针对的是那些在2024年已被入侵、攻击和夷为平地的城镇，这些城镇在经历了15个月的主动攻击和人口流失后，位于以色列国防军（在以色列境内）所占据的高脊之下，处于支援前线。真主党并没有像你所希望看到以色列被击败的那样表现出色，但他们在任何严酷的条件下都尽了人力所能及的一切，表现卓越。以色列国防军称，停火将使其能够巩固当前区域的占领，以保护以色列免受反坦克导弹攻击（这就是为什么我们需要数十架FPV无人机）。以色列国防军将拆毁城镇并在黎巴嫩境内建立基地，以防黎巴嫩国家无法解除真主党的武装。如果黎巴嫩国家失败且占领持续，抵抗行动和战争将再次发生。你们明白这里的事件循环吗？

text: 🇺🇸 ✝️ 🤡 Trump’s spiritual advisor, Paula White: “Saying no to Trump would be saying no to God” 🐻 OK, we admit - it's getting hard to keep up with this all. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: The Spectator Index Iran told mediators it will 'continue to limit the number of ships allowed to cross the Strait of Hormuz' and that it will also charge tolls for the 'remaining period of the cease-fire', according to Wall Street Journal report. tweet

text: Visioner 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 BREAKING | Head of Iran's National Security Commission Ebrahim Azizi: "The time has come to comply with the new Maritime Regime of the Strait of Hormuz. These regulations are determined by Iran, not by social media posts! Under this new system, only commercial vessels with authorization from the IRGC Navy are permitted to navigate through designated routes after paying the required tolls. If the U.S. attempts to create any disturbance for Iranian ships, this situation can easily be changed." See the latest updates with us: @visionergeo tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 突发 | 伊朗国家安全委员会主席易卜拉欣·阿齐兹：“现在是遵守霍尔木兹海峡新海事制度的时候了。这些规定由伊朗决定，而不是由社交媒体帖子决定！根据这一新制度，只有获得伊斯兰革命卫队海军授权的商船，在支付所需通行费后，才被允许通过指定航线航行。如果美国试图对伊朗船只制造任何干扰，这种情况很容易改变。”与我们一起查看最新动态： @visionergeo 推文

text: Reporter: Did Anthropic have a meeting at the White House? Trump: Who? Reporter: Anthropic. Trump: I have no idea.
text_zh: 记者：Anthropic 是否在白宫举行过会议？特朗普：谁？记者：Anthropic。特朗普：我不知道。

text: 🇮🇷 🇱🇧 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 Hezbollah official, Nawaf al-Moussawi: • Any violation of the ceasefire by the enemy will be met with an appropriate response from our side. • There is no turning back; assassinations or shelling as they occurred before the last battle are unacceptable and non-negotiable.
text_zh: 🇮🇷 🇱🇧 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 真主党官员纳瓦夫·穆萨维：• 敌人对停火协议的任何违反都将遭到我方适当的回应。• 没有回头路；像上次战斗前那样发生的暗杀或炮击是不可接受且不可谈判的。

text: Reporter: Iran says there are significant differences. Trump: There could be. If there are, we will have to straighten it out, but I don’t think there are too many significant differences.
text_zh: 记者：伊朗表示存在重大分歧。特朗普：可能会有。如果有，我们将不得不解决它，但我认为没有太多重大分歧。

text: Trump: When the agreement is signed, the blockade ends.
text_zh: 特朗普：协议签署后，封锁就会结束。

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 WSJ: Iran informed mediators that they will continue to limit the number of ships allowed to transit the Strait of Hormuz in addition to charging tolls for the remainder of the ceasefire. Vessels will still be required to coordinate passage the IRGC. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 《华尔街日报》：伊朗通知调解人，他们将继续限制允许通过霍尔木兹海峡的船只数量，并在停火剩余期间收取通行费。船只仍需与伊斯兰革命卫队协调通行。 @wfwitness

text: 🇺🇸 Meanwhile, there’s a TPUSA event going on—or whatever remains of TPUSA under Erika Kirk. But U.S. Representative Paul Gosar seems to be having a wild ride over there. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 与此同时，TPUSA（美国转折点组织）正在举办一场活动——或者说在埃里卡·柯克领导下 TPUSA 剩下的东西。但美国众议员保罗·戈萨尔似乎在那里玩得很疯。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇷🇺 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 Deputy Chairman of Russia’s Security Council Dmitry Medvedev: It's not clear how the truce between Washington and Tehran will play out. But one thing is certain — Iran has tested its nuclear weapons. It is called the Strait of Hormuz. Its potential is inexhaustible.
text_zh: 🇷🇺 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 俄罗斯联邦安全会议副主席德米特里·梅德韦杰夫：华盛顿与德黑兰之间的休战将如何发展尚不清楚。但有一点是肯定的——伊朗已经测试了其核武器。它被称为霍尔木兹海峡。其潜力是无穷无尽的。

text: 🇷🇺 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 Deputy Chairman of Russia’s Security Council Dmitry Medvedev: It's not clear how the truce between Washington and Tehran will play out. But one thing is certain — Iran has tested its nuclear weapons. It is called the Strait of Hormuz. Its potential is inexhaustible.
text_zh: 🇷🇺 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 俄罗斯联邦安全会议副主席德米特里·梅德韦杰夫：华盛顿和德黑兰之间的休战将如何发展尚不清楚。但有一点是肯定的——伊朗已经测试了其核武器。它被称为霍尔木兹海峡。它的潜力是无穷无尽的。

text: A wise man once said "Send him 2-3 fpv and forget" I beg you Hezbullah. Adopt it widely and very fast
text_zh: 一位智者曾经说过：“送他2-3架FPV（第一人称视角无人机），然后忘掉它”。我恳求你们，真主党。广泛且迅速地采用它。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇱🇸🇾 The IDF officer described the collapse of the Assad’s Syrian army after Ahmed al-Sharaa took over: “The Syrian army abandoned this location when Jolani essentially conquered Syria; they abandoned all the outposts and fled. We then seized the space…" ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇸🇾 The Israeli officer interviewed a young local Syrian Bedouin, Ahmed, near the border of the security zone. Asked how he sees Israeli soldiers in the area, Ahmed replied: “It’s normal.” When asked which is better – now or before [the IDF presence] – he said: “Now is better.” Pressed on what was not good before, he explained that for him personally, he did not go out much, but “in terms of life, now is a bit better than before.” @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇱🇸🇾 以色列国防军军官描述了艾哈迈德·沙拉（Ahmed al-Sharaa）接管后阿萨德叙利亚军队的崩溃：‘当朱拉尼（Jolani）实质上征服叙利亚时，叙利亚军队放弃了这个地点；他们放弃了所有哨所并逃跑了。然后我们占领了该空间……’” ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇸🇾 这位以色列军官在安全区边界附近采访了一位年轻的当地叙利亚贝都因人艾哈迈德。当被问及他如何看待该地区的以色列士兵时，艾哈迈德回答说：“这很正常。”当被问及现在和以前（以色列国防军进驻前）哪个更好时，他说：“现在更好。”当被追问以前有什么不好的地方时，他解释说，对他个人而言，他以前不怎么出门，但“就生活而言，现在比以前好一点。” @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to Lebanese News and Updates: "The Israeli Air Force's elite Shaldag unit landed at the so-called Cristofani Ridge, several kilometers north of Mount Hermon, and established control in the area." Location is here. Very bad
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 Lebanese News and Updates：“以色列空军精锐沙尔达格（Shaldag）部队降落在赫尔蒙山以北几公里的所谓克里斯托法尼山脊（Cristofani Ridge），并控制了该地区。”位置在这里。非常糟糕

text: 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Basically a recap of today's news... 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 基本上是今天新闻的摘要…… 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Iran told mediators it will continue restricting ship traffic through the Strait of Hormuz and charge tolls during the cease-fire. Vessels must coordinate with the Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps, which can still block ships from countries Iran considers hostile. Officials say Tehran also wants a long-term role managing the strait and collecting fees. Source: WSJ
text_zh: 伊朗告诉调解人，它将在停火期间继续限制通过霍尔木兹海峡的船只交通并收取通行费。船只必须与伊斯兰革命卫队协调，后者仍然可以阻止伊朗认为敌对国家的船只通行。官员们表示，德黑兰还希望在管理海峡和收取费用方面发挥长期作用。来源：华尔街日报

text: After Israel went nuts after being shocked by Trump's Public statement that they are no longer allowed to attack Lebanon, the Trump administration issued a clarification. Israel can attack in self defense and there is no limit to what self defense can be defined. It can be a new war under the pretext of self defense. ❗️ A U.S. official clarifies Trump's Lebanon comments: “The President’s ceasefire agreement between Lebanon and Israel clearly states that Israel will not carry out any offensive military operations against Lebanese targets but preserves its right to self-defense against planned, imminent, or ongoing attacks"
text_zh: 在以色列因特朗普公开声明不再允许他们攻击黎巴嫩而感到震惊并陷入疯狂后，特朗普政府发表了澄清。以色列可以进行自卫，对自卫的定义没有限制。这可能是在自卫借口下的一场新战争。❗️ 一位美国官员澄清了特朗普关于黎巴嫩的评论：“总统在黎巴嫩和以色列之间达成的停火协议明确规定，以色列不会对黎巴嫩目标进行任何进攻性军事行动，但保留其针对计划中、迫在眉睫或正在进行的攻击进行自卫的权利”

text: — ❗️ 🇺🇸 / 🇮🇷 BREAKING: ‘Iran has told mediators it will continue to limit the number of ships allowed to cross the Strait of Hormuz and charge tolls for the remaining period of the ceasefire’ – Wall Street Journal @Middle_East_Spectator
text_zh: — ❗️ 🇺🇸 / 🇮🇷 快讯：‘伊朗已告知调解人，它将继续限制允许通过霍尔木兹海峡的船只数量，并在停火期的剩余时间内收取通行费’ – 华尔街日报 @Middle_East_Spectator

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇹🇷🇵🇰🇪🇬🇸🇦🇮🇷 Reuters: The foreign ministers of Turkey, Pakistan, Egypt and Saudi Arabia will meet today on the sidelines of a diplomatic forum in Antalya to discuss solutions to regional issues, including the war in Iran. The four countries also met twice…" ⚡️ 🇹🇷 🇵🇰 🇪🇬 🇸🇦 🇮🇷 The Foreign Ministers of Egypt, Turkey, Pakistan, and Saudi Arabia took a group photo before the beginning of their meeting to discuss ongoing peace efforts for the conflict with Iran. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇹🇷🇵🇰🇪🇬🇸🇦🇮🇷 路透社：土耳其、巴基斯坦、埃及和沙特阿拉伯的外交部长今天将在安塔利亚外交论坛期间会面，讨论包括伊朗战争在内的地区问题解决方案。这四个国家此前也曾两次会面……” ⚡️ 🇹🇷 🇵🇰 🇪🇬 🇸🇦 🇮🇷 埃及、土耳其、巴基斯坦和沙特阿拉伯的外交部长在讨论针对伊朗冲突的持续和平努力的会议开始前合影。 @wfwitness

text: WarMonitor Netanyahu was caught off guard and “shocked” after Trump suddenly declared Israel was “prohibited” from bombing Lebanon, a stance that contradicted the ceasefire terms and reportedly wasn’t communicated to Israel in advance. (Axios) tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 内塔尼亚胡在特朗普突然宣布“禁止”以色列轰炸黎巴嫩后感到措手不及且“震惊”，这一立场与停火条款相矛盾，据报道并未提前告知以色列。（Axios）推文

text: WarMonitor Zelenskyy says intelligence shows road construction and artillery positions being set up in Belarus near Ukraine’s border, warning Russia may be trying to draw Belarus further into the war. Belarus is preparing for war with Ukraine, - Zelensky According to intelligence data, roads to the territory of Ukraine are being built and artillery positions are being set up. I have instructed the relevant channels to warn the actual leadership of Belarus about Ukraine's readiness to defend its land and independence. - Shaun Pinner tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 泽连斯基表示，情报显示白俄罗斯在乌克兰边境附近正在进行道路建设和部署炮兵阵地，警告俄罗斯可能试图将白俄罗斯进一步拖入战争。白俄罗斯正在为与乌克兰的战争做准备，- 泽连斯基。根据情报数据，通往乌克兰领土的道路正在修建，炮兵阵地正在部署。我已经指示相关渠道警告白俄罗斯的实际领导层，乌克兰已做好保卫其土地和独立的准备。- Shaun Pinner 推文
